display_information.name: Block Kit Adventure
display_information.description: A choose-your-own-adventure game built with Block Kit
display_information.long_description:
Block Kit Adventure is an interactive choose-your-own-adventure game that runs entirely inside Slack. The story — "The Lost Deploy" — drops you into a Friday afternoon production incident. Your choices determine how the situation unfolds across 13 scenes and 6 possible endings.

Each scene is rendered with Block Kit components: headers, sections, buttons, dividers, and context blocks. Messages update in place as you progress, so the conversation stays clean.

How to play:
• Use the "Start Adventure" global shortcut from Slack's search bar
• Or open the app's Home tab and click "Start Adventure"

The game sends a DM with your first scene. Click buttons to make choices. At the end, you'll see a summary of the path you took and can play again to explore different outcomes.
